steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The passage lists two consecutive actions showing Jovita's expanding activism: as a reporter, she voiced support for a Mexican revolt, and she founded the League of Mexican Women. The transition must show the second action is additional to the first.

steps.title: Match the transition to the relationship
steps.content: ”Additionally,” directly shows the League was another action added to her activism, extending her work beyond reporting. The other three suggest conclusion, example, or contrast—none of which fit accumulating actions. That matches choice A — A is correct.
